message:
test(conformance): add stdlib_conversion, string_strtok, pthread_tls_keys fixtures

Adds fixture tests for stdlib_conversion (atoi, strtol), string_strtok
(strtok/strtok_r tokenization), and pthread_tls_keys (TLS key operations).
Also documents pthread_thread.json skip reason (requires thread lifecycle).

Test count: 101 -> 103

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
